prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类（含原理科）最低位次依次约 14477→17525→16295→16561→14473，呈先降后升的波动走势；2022 年大幅后移至 17525 后逐步回升，2025 年回到 14473 附近，与 2021 年基本持平，近 3 年累计前移约 2000 名，2025 年基准约 14473 名；本省物理类计划 2021 年 630 人、2022 年 626 人、2023 年 642 人、2024 年 641 人、2025 年 632 人；2026 年计划 591 人，较 2025 年减少约 41 人（-6.5%），属明显缩招，竞争压力有所上升。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东北林业大学为教育部直属 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名 2026 年约第 115 名，近年排名稳定在第 113–115 名区间，学校层次定位清晰；声誉文件中未见东北林业大学明显负面舆情记录；抖音学校热度总排名第 59 位（样本 15 条视频，综合热度约 54 万），评价为「较热」，短视频平台有一定关注度，但热度水平中等偏上，未出现爆款级传播；第五轮学科评估中东北林业大学未出现在 A- 及以上等级名单中，但学校以林学、林业工程为特色，风景园林、木材科学与工程等专业具有行业优势，对农林类考生有稳定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信 息类、电气类等工科专业社会热度持续偏高，东北林业大学上述专业招生位次靠前（2025 年计算机类约 8081 名、电子信息类约 8497 名），对高分考生有吸引力；传统农林类专业热度一般。黑龙江省 2026 年高考总人数约 16.7 万，较 2025 年物理类+历史类合计约 17.2 万略有下降，竞争压力小幅缓解；东北林业大学位于黑龙江省哈尔滨市，为本省唯一教育部直属 211 高校，对本省考生有天然的地域偏好优势；本省招生计划占比高（物理类约 590–640 人规模），本地考生报考意愿较强。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 14473、2026 年缩招约 6.5% 使竞争加剧、本省考生总数略降有对冲、学校声誉平稳、工科热门专业维持吸引力等因素，预计 2026 年物理类最低录取位次较 2025 年有所前移（更容易进），预测最低位次约 13940 名，区间 13440–14440 名。

- 电子信息类（电子信息工程、通信工程）
- 电气类（电气工程及其自动化、自动化）
- 人工智能。

- 林业工程类（成栋班）。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 13440–14440 名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如 13000 名以内）可重点冲刺计算机类、电子信息类等热门工科专业；位次接近区间上限（如 14400 名附近）建议以三档保底为主，兼顾二档中位专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including former Science) were approximately 14477 → 17525 → 16295 → 16561 → 14473, showing a fluctuating trend of first decreasing then increasing; after a significant drop to 17525 in 2022, it gradually recovered, returning to around 14473 in 2025, roughly the same as 2021, with a cumulative forward shift of about 2000 places in the last 3 years, and a 2025 baseline of about 14473; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 630 in 2021, 626 in 2022, 642 in 2023, 641 in 2024, and 632 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 591, a decrease of about 41 (-6.5%) compared to 2025, indicating a significant reduction in enrollment, increasing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeast Forestry University is a directly affiliated 211 Project and Double First-Class university under the Ministry of Education; its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking in 2026 is approximately 115th, with stable rankings in the 113–115 range in recent years, providing a clear positioning of the school's level; no significant negative public opinion records were found in the reputation documents; the university's overall Douyin popularity ranking is 59th (sample of 15 videos, comprehensive popularity about 540,000), rated as 'relatively hot', with some attention on short video platforms but at a moderately high level, without viral-level dissemination; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Northeast Forestry University did not appear in the A- or above list, but the school is characterized by forestry and forestry engineering, with majors like landscape architecture and wood science and engineering having industry advantages, providing stable appeal to agriculture and forestry candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity, with Northeast Forestry University's admission rankings for these majors being relatively high (in 2025, Computer Science about 8081, Electronic Information about 8497), attracting high-scoring candidates; traditional agriculture and forestry majors have average popularity. The total number of candidates in Heilongjiang Province for the 2026 Gaokao is about 167,000, a slight decrease from the combined total of about 172,000 for Physics and History categories in 2025, slightly easing competition pressure; Northeast Forestry University is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang Province, and is the only directly affiliated 211 university under the Ministry of Education in the province, giving it a natural regional preference advantage for local candidates; the proportion of provincial enrollment is high (Physics Category about 590–640 people), and local candidates have a strong willingness to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 14473, the approximately 6.5% enrollment reduction in 2026 increasing competition, the slight decrease in total provincial candidates providing some offset, stable school reputation, and sustained appeal of popular engineering majors, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will shift forward (easier to enter) compared to 2025, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 13940, in the range of 13440–14440.

- Artificial Intelligence.

- Civil Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 13440–14440, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, with Tier 1 majors as a stretch and Tier 3 majors as a safety net; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 13000), prioritize Tier 1 popular engineering majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information; for rankings near the upper limit (e.g., around 14400), it is advisable to mainly use Tier 3 majors as a safety net, while also considering Tier 2 mid-level majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including former Liberal Arts) were approximately 2541→2645→3874→2981→2986. In 2023, there was a significant drop to 3874 followed by a rapid recovery. In 2024–2025, it stabilized around 2980, remaining nearly flat in the last two years, with a 2025 baseline of about 2986. The provincial History Category enrollment plan was 119 in 2021, 119 in 2022, 120 in 2023, 125 in 2024, and 150 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 171, an increase of about 21 (+14%) from 2025, representing a clear expansion, easing competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeast Forestry University is a directly affiliated 211 Project and Double First-Class university under the Ministry of Education. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks approximately 115th, with stable rankings in recent years and a clear positioning. No significant negative public opinion records were found in reputation documents. On Douyin, the university's overall popularity ranks 59th, rated as 'relatively hot', with some social attention but no viral-level spread. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Northeast Forestry University did not appear in the A- or above list, but the university is characterized by forestry and forestry engineering, with landscape architecture and other majors having industry advantages.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language and Literature are socially hot, with Law having clear advantages for civil service exams. Business Administration categories show divergent popularity. The total number of Gaokao examinees in Heilongjiang Province in 2026 is about 167,000, a slight decrease from 2025, slightly easing competitive pressure. Northeast Forestry University is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang Province, and is one of the top 211 universities for local candidates, with a high proportion of provincial enrollment (History Category scale of about 120–170), and strong willingness among local candidates to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2986, the approximately 14% enrollment expansion in 2026 significantly easing competition, a slight decrease in total provincial examinees providing some offset, and stable university reputation, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 will shift backward (easier to enter) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 3217, with a range of 2717–3717.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 2700), you can focus on reaching for popular majors like Law and Marxist Theory. If your ranking is near the upper limit (e.g., around 3700), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors as safety.
